title: ConsentState
description: Single source of truth for a user's consent. Persisted client-side (web: cookie/localStorage, RN: AsyncStorage) and mirrored append-only to the server ledger. Non-necessary categories default to false (fail-closed).

policyVersion.description: Privacy-policy version this decision was made against, e.g. '2026-06-01'. If the live policy version is higher than this, re-prompt.

decidedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent decision.

region.description: Resolved region. UNKNOWN must be treated as EU (strictest).

source.description: How this state was produced. 'gpc'/'dnt' = seeded from browser signal; 'guardian' = verifiable parental consent (minor).

isMinor.description: True if the user is under the local age threshold (KR <14, US COPPA <13). When true, advertising and personalized analytics are forced OFF.

necessary.description: Always true. Cannot be withdrawn; only disclosed.
